Work Blog Open Source Contact

Case Study

Nephtys

A real-time connector for live event streams and edge integrations.

Go Streaming NATS JetStream gRPC Webhooks

Why it exists

Live interfaces such as webhooks, WebSockets, SSE, and gRPC all have different operational quirks, but downstream systems still need one stable event contract.

Technical center

Nephtys manages connector lifecycles, normalizes inbound events, persists them to NATS JetStream, and exposes a REST API so stream management is operable instead of hardcoded.

What to show next

A deployed demo with connector configuration, metrics, and an event replay flow would show the operational value clearly.

Repository
Connector dashboard

A future dashboard snapshot covering connector status, throughput, retries, and downstream delivery.

Event flow

A real trace showing ingress, normalization, JetStream persistence, and replay or fan-out.
